story.text:
# 🚪 privacy_pools_v2_mage (the circuit workshop)
**gateway** · swordsman · knowledge

Dual-agent harness instance #4 (first mechanically fitted) — the fleet works BLIND from the compiled R1CS: privacy-pools-core v2 withdraw certified 36,832 → 17,159 statement / 17,371 value-tier constraints (ceremony-ready); commitment 1,537 → 712; merkleTree 16,748 → 7,846 (below true --O2). POSITIONING resolved 2026-07-11 into two threads: Thread 1 = the 0xbow contribution (gift, V2-CR-1..10, frozen report at the door, Letter A); Thread 2 = agentprivacy pools / mana pools (V2-CR-11..14, engine built + proven, product extracted to ~/mana pools, Letter B waits on A). Fulfils the 'Privacy Pools · familial rather than borrowed' geometry of Register of Invitations entry 01.

## Edges out

- *implements* → [[Dual-Agent Harness]]
- *extends* → [[Privacy Pools]]
- *references* → [[CredentialV1 (the first authored circuit)]]
- *relates_to* → [[V19 — Plonkish Blade (Vulcana)]]
- *relates_to* → [[V35 — Horizon District (Eos · Dokimé · Poros)]]
